title: Morph_CNeT: A new GIS tool to extract morphometric attributes characterising channel network topology of Indian catchments
author: Rana, Saroj
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Morph_CNeT” (Morphometric Channel Network Extraction Tool) can facilitate extraction of the topology based new morphometric attributes by processing DEM datasets within GIS framework. Morph_CNeT tool is used to create a repository named as Morph_CNeT-India of topological catchment attributes for 1749 gauging stations maintained by the Central Water Commission (CWC) across 22 River basin Systems of India.
steps_raw: Morph_CNeT” (Morphometric Channel Network Extraction Tool) can facilitate extraction of the topology based new morphometric attributes by processing DEM datasets within GIS framework. Morph_CNeT tool is used to create a repository named as Morph_CNeT-India of topological catchment attributes for 1749 gauging stations maintained by the Central Water Commission (CWC) across 22 River basin Systems of India.
